title: The Last Patient of Ward Nine
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A night-shift nurse at a decommissioned psychiatric hospital discovers that Ward Nine's last patient, who was locked in a padded cell in 1972, is still alive and perfectly healthy, because something inside the cell has been feeding on everyone who has tried to let him out.
long_description: A night-shift nurse at a decommissioned psychiatric hospital discovers that Ward Nine's last patient, who was locked in a padded cell in 1972, is still alive and perfectly healthy, because something inside the cell has been feeding on everyone who has tried to let him out.
